questions.question:
Micro program is 



CO & Architecture: NIELIT 2016 MAR Scientist C
options: the name of source program in micro computers
the set of instructions indicating the primitive operations in a system
primitive form of macros used in assembly language programming
questions.correct_answer: the set of instructions indicating the primitive operations in a system

questions.question:
A micro programmed control unit



CO & Architecture: NIELIT 2017 OCT Scientific Assistant A (CS)
options: Facilitates easy implementation of a new instruction
Is useful when small programs are to be run
questions.correct_answer: Facilitates easy implementation of a new instruction

questions.question:
A microprogrammed control unit :



CO & Architecture: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist A
options: is useful when small programs are to be run

questions.question:
Consider a control unit generating the control signals. These control signals are divided into five mutually exclusive groups as shown below:

\( \begin{array}{|l|l||l|l|} \hline  \text{Groups} &  G1 &   \text{ \)G1\( }  & G1 &  G1 & G1  \\\hline \text{Control Signals} & 3 & 7 & 10 & 12 & 2 \\ \hline \end{array} \)

How many bits are saved using the Vertical Micro-programmed instead of Horizontal Micro-programmed control unit?



CO & Architecture: NIELIT Scientist B 2020 November: 54
